title: task-result payload
description: Worker -> requester final outcome. status=done|failed. Reports refs of rows the worker recorded via `record apply`.

produced.description: durable rows the worker recorded (it wrote them via record apply; these are refs)

methodology_used.description: BINDING methodology application for this stage. Each item's applied_as MUST resolve (`methodology check --quest-id <q> --stage <stage> --applied-as <ref>`) to the stage's VALIDATED typed record (idea.select / baseline.contract / analysis.bridge / paper_spine / review.verdict). The Orchestrator rejects any item whose applied_as does not resolve — it is no longer free-text. Background-only reading that produced no validated typed artifact goes in methodology_consulted, NOT here.

pack.description: knowledge_pack pack_id whose craft was applied (e.g. ideation-rubric, paper-craft, research-method)

applied_as.description: ref that MUST resolve via `methodology check` to the stage's validated typed record (its id or its *_ref artifact path). Free text is rejected.

methodology_consulted.description: Background reading only (no validated typed application artifact). NOT binding evidence; reported separately from methodology_used so it is never counted as methodology application.

error.description: required when status=failed; the worker leaves experiment.status='failed', not 'done'
